home.meta_description: Pureva natural hair care for weakened hair. Helps reduce breakage and strengthen fragile hair.

hero.headline: The natural routine for stronger hair
hero.claim: Helps reduce hair fall caused by breakage

problem.headline: Concerned about your hair?
problem.body: Hair fall from breakage, dry and weakened strands, loss of density — these signs call for the right routine, not empty promises.
problem.note: Pureva does not promise miracles. Our products are formulated to support a regular hair care routine.

routine_steps.headline: The 4-step routine
routine_steps.subtitle: A progressive approach designed to fit into your weekly hair care routine.
routine_steps.step1_desc: Apply the oil to your scalp and lengths before shampooing. Helps to nourish and prepare the hair.
routine_steps.step2_desc: Apply the mask or a powder (Sidr or Mashat) to damp hair. Leave on, then rinse.
routine_steps.step3_desc: After shampooing, apply the lotion to lengths and scalp. No rinsing needed.
routine_steps.step4_desc: Finish with a few drops of serum on the ends to hydrate and add shine.

best_sellers.headline: Our featured products
best_sellers.subtitle: The most requested products from the Pureva range.

ingredients_preview.headline: Selected natural actives
ingredients_preview.subtitle: Each formula contains natural actives recognised for their properties on weakened hair.
ingredients_preview.fenugreek_desc: Rich in proteins and amino acids, it helps to strengthen the hair fibre.
ingredients_preview.amla_desc: A natural source of vitamin C, amla helps to nourish the scalp and hair lengths.
ingredients_preview.rosemary_desc: Known for its stimulating properties on scalp circulation.
ingredients_preview.nigella_desc: Traditionally used for its nourishing and soothing properties on the scalp.
ingredients_preview.shea_desc: A natural emollient that helps to moisturise and protect dry hair.
ingredients_preview.sidr_desc: Long used to cleanse and strengthen the scalp.
ingredients_preview.keratin_desc: Helps to reinforce the hair fibre structure and reduce breakage.

benefits.headline: What the routine aims for
benefits.b1_desc: Helps reduce hair fall caused by fragility and breakage.
benefits.b2_desc: Nourishing actives to hydrate the scalp and hair lengths.
benefits.b3_desc: The serum and oil help smooth the hair fibre and reveal natural radiance.
benefits.b4_desc: Products designed to fit easily into your regular hair care programme.
benefits.disclaimer: Results vary between individuals, depending on routine consistency and the underlying cause.

faq_preview.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq_preview.q1: Is the routine suitable for all hair types?
faq_preview.a1: The Pureva range is formulated for weakened hair prone to breakage. The mask is suitable for all hair types. If in doubt, contact us before purchasing.
faq_preview.q2: How long before results are visible?
faq_preview.a2: We cannot guarantee specific results or timelines. As with any hair care product, regular use over several weeks is needed to observe a difference. Results vary between individuals.
faq_preview.q3: How do I place an order?
faq_preview.a3: You can order directly via the order form or through WhatsApp. We will contact you to confirm your order and arrange delivery.
faq_preview.q4: Are the products paraben-free or silicone-free?
faq_preview.a4: We do not state this without official confirmation from our formulator. Please refer to the full INCI list shown on each product page.

final_cta.headline: Start the routine
final_cta.body: Discover the complete routine pack — 4 products formulated for weakened hair.

shop.headline: Our products
shop.subtitle: Products formulated for weakened hair prone to breakage.

routine_pack.headline: Weakened Hair Routine Pack
routine_pack.subtitle: 4 products formulated for weakened hair — a complete routine from oil to serum.
routine_pack.who_body: This pack is designed for people whose hair is weakened and prone to breakage. It is not intended for severe hair loss or medical scalp conditions — in those cases, please consult a healthcare professional.
routine_pack.includes_oil: Hair oil (100 ml) — pre-shampoo nourishing treatment
routine_pack.includes_mask: Hair mask — weekly treatment for all hair types
routine_pack.includes_lotion: Hair lotion — leave-in treatment after shampooing
routine_pack.includes_serum: Hair serum (50 ml) — smoothing finish and shine
routine_pack.how_step1: Step 1 — Before shampooing: apply the oil to the scalp and lengths, leave on for at least 30 minutes.
routine_pack.how_step2: Step 2 — After shampooing: apply the mask or a powder (Sidr or Mashat), leave on then rinse.
routine_pack.how_step3: Step 3 — Leave-in: apply the lotion to lengths and scalp.
routine_pack.how_step4: Step 4 — Finish: apply a few drops of serum to the ends.
routine_pack.frequency: Recommended frequency: 1 to 2 times per week.
routine_pack.timeline_body: We cannot guarantee specific results. Regular use over several weeks is needed to observe a change. Results vary depending on hair type, routine consistency, and the underlying cause.
routine_pack.limits_title: What this routine does not do
routine_pack.limits_body: This routine does not treat alopecia, scalp conditions, or hair loss of hormonal or medical origin. If in doubt, consult a dermatologist or doctor.
routine_pack.crosssell_body: Our Sidr and Mashat powders can be incorporated as a complementary treatment in the routine. Available separately.

ingredients.headline: Our ingredients
ingredients.subtitle: Pureva is committed to displaying the full INCI list for each product. Here are the main natural actives used across the range.
ingredients.disclaimer: The full INCI list is shown on each product. If you have known allergies, check the ingredients carefully before use.
ingredients.fenugreek_desc: Rich in plant proteins and amino acids. Used in the formulation for its nourishing properties on the hair fibre.
ingredients.amla_desc: A natural source of vitamin C. Traditionally used for scalp and hair care.
ingredients.rosemary_desc: Known for its stimulating properties on scalp circulation. Present in the lotion.
ingredients.nigella_desc: Vegetable oil with nourishing and soothing properties, used in the hair oil.
ingredients.shea_desc: Natural emollient rich in fatty acids. Present in the mask for its moisturising properties.
ingredients.sidr_desc: Plant powder long used in traditional hair care to cleanse and strengthen.
ingredients.keratin_desc: Hydrolysed hair protein that helps reinforce the hair fibre structure and reduce breakage.
ingredients.collagen_desc: Helps nourish and strengthen the hair fibre. Present in the mask and serum.

about.headline: About Pureva
about.mission_body: Pureva is a natural hair care brand designed for weakened hair prone to breakage. We formulate our products with selected natural actives to support a regular hair care routine.
about.approach_body: We do not display any claim we cannot justify. No promises of guaranteed results, no unverified certifications. Each product displays the full INCI list and a precaution notice.
about.safe_claim: Helps reduce hair fall caused by breakage — that is what we claim, and nothing more.
about.contact_body: For any questions about our products, an order, or advice, you can contact us via WhatsApp or through the contact form.
about.todo_note: More information about the brand and team will be added soon.

contact.headline: Contact us
contact.how_to_order_body: All orders are placed via WhatsApp or through the form below. We will get back to you to confirm availability, final price, and delivery arrangements.
contact.whatsapp_body: Click the button below to start a conversation. Tell us which product(s) you want and your delivery country.
contact.form_intro: Fill in the form and we will reply as soon as possible.
contact.shipping_note: Delivery available in France, Europe and internationally. Rates and lead times are confirmed at the time of order.

shipping.headline: Shipping & Returns
shipping.zones_body: We ship to mainland France, Europe, and internationally. Exact rates and lead times are confirmed at the time of order.

shipping.returns_body: Due to the nature of cosmetic products, returns are only accepted for defective items or items not matching the order. Please contact us within 48 hours of receipt.
shipping.returns_contact: For any issue, contact us via WhatsApp or email.
shipping.todo_policy: The full returns policy will be updated soon.
